task_5.title: strings.xml, AndroidManifest permissions + privacy hardening, dependencies, theme

issues.detail: AndroidManifest.xml already has `android:allowBackup="false"` — task says to set it, but it is already correct. No conflict, just redundant work.

AndroidManifest.xml already has `android:fullBackupContent="false"`. Task asks to add `android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules"`. These can coexist but on API 31+ `dataExtractionRules` supersedes `fullBackupContent`. The task should note this attribute will be ADDED alongside the existing one, not replacing it.
Already in libs.versions.toml (line 23) and app/build.gradle.kts (line 48). Task hint correctly notes to check before adding duplicate — no action needed.

issues.item: compose-richtext and CameraX NOT in version catalog
issues.detail: Confirmed absent from gradle/libs.versions.toml. Both must be added. Gallery-source reference shows correct group: com.halilibo.compose-richtext, version 1.0.0-alpha02 (richtext-commonmark + richtext-ui-material3).
app/src/main/res/xml/ does not exist yet — must be created before placing data_extraction_rules.xml. Standard Android directory, no obstacle.

issues.item: app_name currently Sanctum not Sanctum Machina
issues.detail: strings.xml line 2: `<string name="app_name">Sanctum</string>`. Rename to "Sanctum Machina" as spec requires.

file_existence.app/src/main/res/xml/: DOES NOT EXIST — must be created

findings.api_hallucinations: None — maven group com.halilibo.compose-richtext confirmed in gallery-source

task_5.notes: Task is fully feasible. Key pre-existing values (allowBackup=false, lifecycle-runtime-compose) reduce scope slightly. The task hint correctly anticipates lifecycle-runtime-compose being present. No blockers.

task_6.title: AboutScreen + navigation entry + ModelManagerScreen TopAppBar action + SafeMarkdown

issues.item: ui/about package does not exist yet
issues.detail: app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/ui/about/ does not exist. Must be created as new directory. Standard Kotlin package creation, no obstacle.

app/src/test/ does not exist at all. SafeUriHandlerTest.kt target path is app/src/test/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/ui/chat/SafeUriHandlerTest.kt. Directory must be created AND junit dependency must be added to app/build.gradle.kts (currently has no test deps). Task does not mention adding junit to app module.

issues.item: app/build.gradle.kts has no test dependency block
issues.detail: Current app/build.gradle.kts has no testImplementation block. SafeUriHandlerTest requires JUnit. Task 6 must add `testImplementation(libs.junit)` to app/build.gradle.kts or tests will not compile. Task 5 handles dependencies but does not include junit for app module tests.
app/src/main/assets/ does not exist. Must be created before placing about.md. Standard Android assets dir, no obstacle.

issues.item: ModelManagerScreen TopAppBar has no actions slot currently
issues.detail: ModelManagerScreen.kt line 52: `TopAppBar(title = { Text(...) })` — no `actions` parameter. Adding IconButton in actions is straightforward with M3 TopAppBar API.
NavHost with composable() destinations is used. Adding `composable("about") { AboutScreen(...) }` follows existing pattern exactly.

ModelManagerScreen currently takes `onLoad: (String) -> Unit` as lambda param — no navController passed in. To navigate to about, either add `onAbout: () -> Unit` callback param (consistent with existing pattern) or pass navController. Task spec says `navController.navigate("about")` directly on ModelManagerScreen but current architecture uses lambda callbacks. The lambda approach is more consistent with existing code.

findings.navhost_existence: CONFIRMED — SanctumApp.kt line 16, NavHost with composable() destinations
findings.topappbar_existence: CONFIRMED — ModelManagerScreen.kt line 19 import, line 52 usage

markdown_reference.composition_local_pattern: CompositionLocalProvider used in reference (line 49) — task pattern matches
markdown_reference.note: Reference uses CompositionLocalProvider without provides arg (just styling via ProvideTextStyle) — SafeMarkdown should add `LocalUriHandler provides safeHandler` which is a valid pattern

api_hallucinations.CompositionLocalProvider: Valid Compose API — confirmed in MarkdownText.kt reference

task_6.notes: Task is feasible but has one actionable gap: app module test infrastructure does not exist (no src/test dir, no junit dep in build.gradle.kts). This must be handled within task 6 or explicitly noted as a prerequisite. The navController-vs-callback architecture mismatch is a minor implementation note — lambda callback is the correct approach consistent with existing patterns.
